states.name: Rei
states.title: Goddess of Bounty
states.description: The Great Sage of Kisenkyo, born to a great water dragon and a human mother. Extremely skilled in onmyodo, she protects the swamplands from any who would harm its inhabitants. Her magic places intense strain on her body, and she spends most of her time resting in her pocket dimension, the Realm of Reia, or studying her magic. As a result, her social skills are somewhat atrophied.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Goddess of Bounty
states.description: Her father, a great water dragon, was once the guardian deity of Kisenkyo, but when he left, the duty fell to her. She's spent her life since then striving to protect her people, and though her devotion is respected by most, there are those who view her in a less favorable light.

states.name: Rei
states.title: Goddess of Bounty
states.description: The Great Sage, eh... aye, I've known her since I was a tadpole, and now I'm a withered old frog. She looks the same, of course... She's powerful, aye, none doubt that, and it's good to have her around...but I just can't trust her. The elders remember, and they share the tales...and now it's my turn to remember. When pressed for more details, the elder bikki simply shook his head, saying it was no matter for outsiders to hear of.
